name: Pregnancy Due Date Calculator
seo_title: Pregnancy Due Date Calculator – Easy Calculator
seo_description: Pregnancy Due Date Calculator: enter your values and get instant, accurate results. Free to use, no sign-up and no hassle.
example_label: Calculate due date from LMP of 2026-01-15.
result_context: The date of birth estimated is 40 weeks from the last menstruación; solo 5% nacen in that date exact.
formula_display: Fecha birth = last menstruación + 280 days (40 weeks)
steps: The calculador apply the formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: Not verifying that lmp are in correct units before Calculate
Redondear values intermediums before of the calculation final (pierde precision)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condition is special
desc: Free online pregnancy due date calculator. Enter last menstrual period to get instant results.
